creator: lab+bsd@thinkum.space
text:
Created attachment 237497
lang/gjs update to 1.74.0

gjs is now available in a 1.74.0 release. This release uses mozjs 102

A diff is attached, for updating to the 1.74.0 gjs release

Of course if lang/spidermonkey102 does not build on FreeBSD 12.3 then I suppose this patch would not be usable on 12.3

Tested on FreeBSD 13.1
